articles.title: VeChain Hits All-Time High, But Technicals Spell Trouble
articles.description: While the market waits for a volatility spike that will kick-start a new uptrend, VeChain has stolen the spotlight with new all-time highs. VeChain Enters Price Discovery VeChain made headlines after rising to a new all-time high of $0.0643 on Monday, Mar. 8. The milestone was achieved following a spike in buying pressure at a crucial support level that saw the price of VET rise by more...

articles.title: PayPal Acquires Crypto Security Firm Curv for Nearly $200M. Could this be huge for Algorand?
Balancer Is Coming to Polkadot via Moonbeam
articles.description: Moonbeam, an Ethereum-compatible smart contract parachain, announced it would connect the Balancer protocol with the Polkadot ecosystem. Moonbeam Bridges Balancer, Polkadot The integration with Balancer will add value to the growing DeFi ecosystem to Polkadot. “[Balancer] provides useful DeFi services for investors looking to create investment portfolios consisting of...

articles.title: Brad Garlinghouse: XRP Will Continue Trading Even if Ripple Goes Away
articles.description: While explaining why XRP is not a security, the CEO of Ripple promised that the token will continue trading, even if the company disappears.

articles.title: Chiliz (CHZ) Rides NFT Bullet Train to New All-Time High
articles.description: CHZ is currently on a rollercoaster. It recorded a new all-time high of $0.1698 about two hours ago. Although it has retraced slightly since then, it is still up by 23% since yesterday. The price surge has consequently sent the token’s market capitalization soaring. It’s currently north of the $910 million mark. The world’s … Continued

articles.title: Active user wallets on Ethereum DeFi have dipped 40% in one month
articles.description: Wallets interacting with Ethereum-based decentralized finance protocols have dipped significantly since mid-February.

articles.title: Cardano Price Analysis: ADA Facing Critical Support Following 13% Weekly Drop
articles.description: ADA is now down by a steep 13.5% over the past week as it sits at support on a rising trend line. Against Bitcoin, it's also facing important support.

articles.title: BNB Overtakes ADA by Market Cap, Yet Again
articles.description: BNB has now overtaken ADA. The race for fourth place on the list of the world’s largest cryptocurrencies continues to gain momentum. After momentarily grabbing the position, Cardano’s ADA has been flipped again by Binance’s BNB. Both digital currencies have been on a wild run since the beginning of the year. They both flipped a … Continued

articles.title: ETC Group to Launch Ethereum ETP on Deutsche Borse
articles.description: The financial services company is set to launch the first Ethereum exchange-traded product on the Deutsche Borse marketplace.

articles.title: ICON (ICX) unaffected by South Korean tax investigation into ICONLOOP, says chairman
articles.description: The South Korean tax authority is trying to track the movement of ICO funds raised in foreign countries into its domestic markets.

articles.title: Central Bank of France Eyes XRP as Basis for Digital Euro
articles.description: One of the major European central banks is eyeing XRP as a potential platform for issuing digital Euro

articles.title: IoT Industry Migrates to Polkadot – What to Expect
articles.description: The launch of parachains on the ambitious Polkadot project scheduled for the first quarter of 2021 has set off a quest to merge blockchain technology with IoT services, allowing developers to finally explore the benefits of the scalable multi-chain architecture. At the same time, the interoperability protocol based on Substrate now finds itself in fourth […]
